summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TestCapture AI backend APIs and frontend UI. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Landing page, Dashboard, Popup Preview, and Settings modal.
seed_data_creation: None - used pre-seeded demo session from demoSession.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: (1) Backend: health, root, generate-script with Emergent key fallback (returns Claude model), invalid framework 400, all 4 frameworks produce correct code patterns, password redaction, sessions CRUD with 404 on deleted. (2) Frontend: Landing page hero/buttons/comparison table, Dashboard with 10 timeline steps/framework tabs/AI regenerate/element inspector, Popup with record/stop/framework select/copy, Settings modal with localStorage persistence. Extension zip download verified (25KB, application/zip).

backend: POST /api/generate-script with NO apiKey uses Emergent key, returns Claude model (not offline-template) ✓
frontend: Landing page loads with hero headline 'Record what you do.' ✓
